CAUSE CALLED FOR COURT TRIAL. PL. PRESENT W/STEVEN LITTMAN AS COUNSEL. DEF. PRESENT & IN PRO PER. SETTLED BY STIP. W/JUDGMENT FOR PL. - RESTITUTION OF PREMISES AT 787 GUERRERO ST, S.F, CA. - $2,250 RENT & DAMAAGES - EACH SIDE BEARS THEIR COSTS & ATTY FEES - SEC. DEP. FORFEITED - WRIT TO ISSUE IMMEDIATELY, BUT EVICTION STAYED TO 5-3-94, 5PM - PL. PREPARE JUDGMENT.

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT DAVIS, RICHARD THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 787 GUERRERO ST, S.F, CA. $2,250.00 RENT, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,250.00, STAYED UNTIL MAY-03-1994, LEASE FORFEITED, SEC. DEP. FORF. TO PL. WRIT TO ISSUE IMMEDIATELY, BUT EVICTION STAYED TO 5PM 5-3-94.
